tickets.customer_message: Hi, my Jio postpaid bill for this month is 2500 rupees but my plan is only 499. This is clearly a wrong bill amount.
I received my Jio fiber bill and it includes setup charges which I already paid last month. Dispute this immediately.
Why is my Jio mobile bill so high? It says I used international roaming but I have not left India. Please check.
My train was cancelled due to fog last week. I still haven't received my refund. Help.
I cancelled my Rajdhani ticket 3 days ago. Where is the refund?
The Vande Bharat express was cancelled today. Will I get an automatic refund? Need details.
My electricity bill is 10,000 rupees! The meter reading is completely wrong. I am not paying this.
There is a massive error in my BESCOM bill this month, the meter reader didn't even come to my house.
Disputing my new BESCOM bill. The reading says 500 units but my meter shows 200.
